ddls:
CREATE TABLE "employees" (
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee */,
  "employee_code" TEXT /* Employee code */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the employee */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the employee */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the employee belongs to */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the employee (e.g., HR administrator, manager, employee) */,
  "position" TEXT /* Job position of the employee */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Date the employee was hired */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee's manager */,
  "leave_balance" INTEGER /* Current leave balance of the employee */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level of the employee (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leave_applications" (
  "leave_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each leave application */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee who submitted the leave application */,
  "leave_type" TEXT /* Type of leave applied for (e.g., paid leave, sick leave) */,
  "apply_date" TEXT /* Date when the leave application was submitted */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the leave period */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the leave period */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the leave */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the leave application (e.g., approved, rejected, pending) */,
  "leave_code" INTEGER /* Reference code for the leave application */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the manager who approved the leave */,
  "approved_date" TEXT /* Date when the leave was approved */,
  "document_url" TEXT /* URL of any supporting documents */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("leave_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_leave_applications_approved_by FOREIGN KEY ("approved_by") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_leave_applications_leave_type FOREIGN KEY ("leave_type") REFERENCES leave_types ("leave_type_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_leave_applications_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leave_types" (
  "leave_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each leave type */,
  "leave_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the leave type (e.g., paid leave, sick leave) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the leave type */,
  "max_allowed" INTEGER /* Maximum number of days allowed for the leave type */,
  "carry_over_allowed" INTEGER /* Indicates if the leave can be carried over to the next year */,
  "reset_period" TEXT /* Period after which the leave balance resets (e.g., annually) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("leave_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payroll_integration" (
  "integration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payroll integration */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee */,
  "leave_id" INTEGER /* ID of the leave application */,
  "payroll_reference" TEXT /* Reference code for the payroll system */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the payroll integration (e.g., pending, processed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("integration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payroll_integration_leave_id FOREIGN KEY ("leave_id") REFERENCES leave_applications ("leave_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payroll_integration_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)
